Sponsorships / Restream

Restream

software
Affiliate
$10 per Referral
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

Restream is a super simple livestreaming solution that empowers you to create beautiful videos and multistream to your favorite channels, including Twitch, Kick, YouTube, Facebook and many more.

Restream Referral Program

Invite your friends and viewers to join Restream and get rewarded! You’ll receive cash for each successful paid referral.

How do referrals work?

  • Open the referral dashboard from your account settings to get started.
  • Copy your link and share it with your friends and on stream to start earning rewards.
  • Once you reach the required amount, you can withdraw cash.

Rewards

  • Your referral receives $10 towards their upgrade.
  • You receive $10 that can be withdrawn as cash. You may not earn a crazy amount, but we highly recommend this program if you use Restream. It’s the best multi-streaming software solution on the market.
